location: A chest in a side room off the western upper walkway of Nokstella, Eternal City. From the site of grace, go west and up the first flight of stairs; before the big arch, duck left into a side room where a Nox Swordstress guards a large chest — ignore that one and open the smaller chest next to it, which holds the shield.
tactics: From the Nokstella, Eternal City grace, head west and climb the first staircase.
Turn left into the side room before the large archway; a Nox Swordstress guards the big chest there but the shield is in the smaller chest beside it, no fight required if you're careful.
This is Nokstella (reached via Ainsel River), a different 'Eternal City' from Nokron reached via Siofra River — easy to mix the two up when following guides.
Unique Tier 3 Hardness means even greatswords and colossal weapons bounce off this shield when blocked, unlike any other greatshield in the game.
lore: Fashioned whole from the skull of one of the giant venomous ants that burrow through the Lands Between's underground rivers, the shield still carries a trace of its owner's poison, granting the wielder some resistance to it.

builds.name: Poison-immune Strength tank
builds.why: D-rank Strength scaling greatshield with 100% physical block and a built-in Immunity boost, good for players tanking through Caelid or other poison-heavy areas.
